warheads.name: W87-0
warheads.description: Minuteman III Mk21 reentry vehicle warhead. Deployed since 1986, upgraded from W87 block 0.

warheads.name: W87-1
warheads.description: W87-1 planned for Sentinel GBSD ICBM. Higher yield upgraded version of W87-0.

warheads.name: W78
warheads.description: Minuteman III Mk12A warhead. Deployed 1979, partially replaced by W87-0. Retiring.

warheads.name: W76-1
warheads.description: Trident II D5 primary SLBM warhead. LEP-upgraded version of W76, life-extended to 2040s.

warheads.name: W76-2
warheads.description: Low-yield variant of W76 for Trident II. Deployed 2019 as non-strategic deterrent option.

warheads.name: W88
warheads.description: Highest-yield US operational SLBM warhead. Deployed on Trident II Mk5 RV. 455 kt yield.

warheads.name: B61-12
warheads.description: Variable-yield guided gravity bomb. Selectable: 0.3/1.5/10/50 kt. Deployed with NATO allies.

warheads.name: B83-1
warheads.description: Highest-yield US nuclear weapon. Megaton-class gravity bomb. In reserve/inactive stockpile.

warheads.name: W80-4
warheads.description: ALCM warhead for LRSO (Long Range Stand-Off) cruise missile. Under development/deployment.

delivery_systems.name: LGM-30G Minuteman III
delivery_systems.description: Land-based silo ICBM, backbone of US nuclear triad. 400 deployed in WY/ND/MT silo fields.

delivery_systems.name: UGM-133A Trident II D5
delivery_systems.description: Ohio-class SSBN SLBM. 14 boats × 20 tubes = 280 missiles. Highest accuracy SLBM in world.

delivery_systems.name: B-2A Spirit
delivery_systems.description: Stealth strategic bomber. Carries up to 16 B61-12 or 8 B83-1. Based at Whiteman AFB, MO.

delivery_systems.name: B-52H Stratofortress
delivery_systems.description: Long-range strategic bomber carrying ACM-86B and future LRSO cruise missiles. 46 nuclear-capable.

delivery_systems.name: F-35A Lightning II
delivery_systems.description: Dual-capable fighter for NATO nuclear sharing mission. Based in Europe and CONUS.

delivery_systems.name: B-21A Raider
delivery_systems.description: Next-generation stealth strategic bomber. 6 initial aircraft; planned fleet of 100+.
